Kya aap jaante hain? Hinduism duniya ka sabse purana dharm hai — ise 'Sanatan Dharm' kaha jaata hai, jiska arth hai 'shaashvat dharm'. Yeh 5000+ saal purana hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Sanskrit ko 'Devbhasha' kaha jaata hai — yeh computers ke liye sabse zyada suitable bhasha mani jaati hai (NASA research).
Kya aap jaante hain? Rig Veda duniya ki sabse purani kitaab hai, jo lagbhag 3500+ saal purani hai. Yeh shruti parampara se surakshit rahi.
Kya aap jaante hain? Yoga ka ullekh sabse pehle Rig Veda mein mila hai. Patanjali ke Yoga Sutra mein 196 sutron mein puri paddhati di gayi hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Shunya (0) ka aavishkaar Bharat mein hua tha. Aryabhata aur Brahmagupta ne ise ganit mein sthaapit kiya.
Kya aap jaante hain? Kumbh Mela duniya ka sabse bada dharmik aayojan hai — 2019 mein 24 crore log aaye the. Yeh antriksh se bhi dikhai deta hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Hanuman Chalisa mein Surya ki Prithvi se doori ka sahi ullekh hai — 'Yug sahastra yojan par bhanu' = lagbhag 15 crore km!
Kya aap jaante hain? Ayurveda duniya ki sabse purani chikitsa paddhati hai — 5000+ saal purana. Charaka Samhita aaj bhi medical students padhte hain.
Kya aap jaante hain? Varanasi (Kashi) duniya ka sabse purana lagaataar basa hua sheher hai — 5000+ saal purana!
Kya aap jaante hain? Mahabharat duniya ki sabse lambi kavita hai — 1 lakh se zyada shlok hain. Yeh Bible aur Iliad dono se 10 guna badi hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bhagwan Jagannath ka rath yatra Puri mein hota hai — isi se English shabd 'Juggernaut' bana hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Hinduism mein 33 koti devta ka arth '33 crore' nahi hai — 'koti' ka ek arth 'prakar' bhi hai, matlab 33 prakar ke devta.
Kya aap jaante hain? Shri Yantra ka geometry itna complex hai ki modern computers ko bhi ise perfectly draw karna mushkil hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Nalanda Vishwavidyalaya duniya ka pehla university tha (5th century) — yahan 10,000 students 2000 teachers se padhte the.
Kya aap jaante hain? Sushruta (600 BCE) ne duniya ki pehli plastic surgery ki thi — naak ki surgery (rhinoplasty) ka vivaran Sushruta Samhita mein hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bhagavad Gita ko 'management ka sabse purana granth' bhi kaha jaata hai — IIM aur Harvard mein iska adhyayan hota hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Hinduism akela dharm hai jismein samay ko chakravarti (cyclic) maana jaata hai — Satya, Treta, Dwapar, Kali yug ka cycle chalta rehta hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Mandir ki ghanti ka dhwani Om ki frequency (136.1 Hz) ke karib hota hai — yeh mann ko shaant karta hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Tulsi ka paudha roz 20 ghante oxygen deta hai aur mosquitoes ko bhi door rakhta hai — isliye Hindu ghar mein Tulsi ki puja hoti hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Tirumala Tirupati Balaji duniya ka sabse zyada visit kiya jaane wala dharmik sthal hai — roz 50,000-1,00,000 darshanaarthi aate hain.
Kya aap jaante hain? Chanakya ki Arthashastra (4th century BCE) mein economics, military strategy aur governance ka pura vigyaan likha hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Konark ka Surya Mandir ek vistrit sundial hai — iske pahiyon se samay padha ja sakta hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Panini ki Ashtadhyayi (5th century BCE) duniya ki pehli formal grammar hai — modern linguistics isi par aadhaarit hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Dhanvantari ko Ayurveda ka devta maana jaata hai — Dhanteras par inki puja hoti hai. Ve Samudra Manthan se prakat hue the.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bharat mein 30 lakh se zyada mandir hain — yeh duniya ke kisi bhi desh se zyada hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Hindu calendar mein Uttarayan (14 Jan) se din bade hote hain — Bhishma Pitamah ne apni mrityu ke liye isi samay ka intezaar kiya tha.
Kya aap jaante hain? Rath Yatra mein Jagannath ji ki murti har 12 saal mein badli jaati hai — purani murti mein se ek rahasyamay cheez nayi murti mein dali jaati hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Angkor Wat (Cambodia) duniya ka sabse bada Hindu mandir hai — yeh 400 acre mein phaila hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Vedic ganit mein 'Shulba Sutra' mein Pythagoras theorem ka ullekh hai — yeh Pythagoras se kai shatabdi pehle likha gaya tha.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bharat ka naam Raja Bharat ke naam par pada hai — jo Dushyant aur Shakuntala ke putra the.
Kya aap jaante hain? Makar Sankranti par patang udaane ki parampara scientific hai — subah ki dhoop mein Vitamin D milta hai jo sardi ke baad zaruri hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Triveni Sangam (Prayagraj) mein teen nadiyan milti hain — Ganga, Yamuna aur gupt Saraswati. Kumbh yahan lagta hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bhagwan Shiva ke 1008 naam hain — Shiva Sahasranaam mein inke sabhi naamon ka varnan hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Ramayana mein pushpak vimaan ka varnan milta hai — yeh duniya ka pehla 'flying machine' ka ullekh hai!
Kya aap jaante hain? Neem ka ped Hinduism mein pavitra maana jaata hai — yeh antibacterial, antiviral aur antifungal hai. Ayurveda mein 'sarva rog nivarini' hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Dwarka nagri samudra ke andar mili hai — marine archaeologists ne Krishna ki Dwarka ke avshesh khoje hain!
Kya aap jaante hain? Holi ka tyohar Holika Dahan ki katha se juda hai — yeh burai par acchai ki jeet ka pratik hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bharatanatyam, Kathak, Odissi jaise shastriya nritya mandiron mein devta ki seva ke liye shuru hue the.
Kya aap jaante hain? Vedic astronomy mein 27 nakshatron ka varnan hai — modern astronomy bhi inhe confirm karti hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bhagwan Krishna ne Bhagavad Gita mein 'Karma Yoga' ka concept diya — 'Karm karo, phal ki chinta mat karo' (BG 2.47).
Kya aap jaante hain? Shankaracharya ne 8th century mein char math sthapit kiye — Sringeri, Puri, Dwarka aur Jyotirmath — jo aaj bhi Sanatan ki raksha karte hain.
Kya aap jaante hain? 12 Jyotirlinga Bhagwan Shiva ke sabse pavitra sthal hain — Somnath se lekar Rameshwaram tak, poore Bharat mein hain.
Kya aap jaante hain? Garuda Purana mein mrityu ke baad ki yatra ka vivaran hai — yeh aatma ke 13 din ke safar ka varnan karta hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Tulsi vivah ke baad hi Hindu vivah ka muhurat shuru hota hai — Dev Uthani Ekadashi par Bhagwan Vishnu jaag uthte hain.
Kya aap jaante hain? Shakuntalam (Kalidas) ko duniya ki pehli romantic play maana jaata hai — yeh 4th century mein likhi gayi thi.
Kya aap jaante hain? Surya Namaskar ke 12 aasan 12 Surya mantra ke saath kiye jaate hain — yeh poore sharir ka vyaayaam ek saath karta hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Vastu Shastra architecture ka Vedic vigyaan hai — yeh 5000+ saal purana hai aur Feng Shui se bhi praacheen hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bhagwan Vishnu Kshirsagar (doodh ke samudra) mein Shesh Naag par shayanit rehte hain — yeh brahmand ki sthiti ka pratik hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Hinduism mein 4 Purusharth hain — Dharm, Arth, Kaam, Moksha. Yeh jeewan ka sampurn marg darshata hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Peepal ka ped 24 ghante oxygen deta hai — Hindu parampara mein ise Bhagwan Vishnu ka roop mana jaata hai.
Kya aap jaante hain? Bhasma (vibhuti) lagane se skin ke rondh khulte hain aur electromagnetic energy absorb hoti hai — isliye Shiv bhakt bhasma lagate hain.
Kya aap jaante hain? Satyanarayana Vrat Katha Skanda Purana se li gayi hai — yeh Purnima ko ki jaati hai aur ghar mein sukh-samriddhi laati hai.
